# Titan Peptide Lab

> Research-grade peptide formulations with HPLC-verified purity, lot-matched release sheets, and independent ISO 17025 retest after dispatch. Crypto-only checkout (USDC on Solana recommended; BTC, ETH, ERC-20 USDC, SOL accepted). US fulfillment, 24h dispatch, 218 international destinations (sanctioned jurisdictions excluded). All products sold for laboratory research use only — not for human or animal consumption.

## Quality and methodology

- [Lab testing methodology](https://www.titanpeptidelab.com/lab-testing/): HPLC-UV purity (release target ≥99%), ESI-MS identity confirmation, USP <71> sterility, LAL endotoxin, ICP-MS heavy metals, GC-FID residual solvents. In-house release sheet ships in the box; independent ISO 17025 retest follows by email within 5 business days of dispatch — same lot code on both documents.
- [Specimen COA](https://www.titanpeptidelab.com/specimen-coa.pdf)
- [Quality program overview](https://www.titanpeptidelab.com/quality/)

## Products

- [BPC-157 nasal spray](https://www.titanpeptidelab.com/products/bpc-157-nasal-spray/)

- [CJC-1295 + Ipamorelin vial](https://www.titanpeptidelab.com/products/cjc-1295-ipamorelin/)
- [Semax nasal spray](https://www.titanpeptidelab.com/products/semax-nasal-spray/)
- [Selank nasal spray](https://www.titanpeptidelab.com/products/selank-nasal-spray/)
- [Selank + Semax stack nasal spray](https://www.titanpeptidelab.com/products/selank-semax-stack/)

## Where to buy and vendor comparison

- [Peptide Sciences alternative — where to buy after the 2026 shutdown](https://www.titanpeptidelab.com/peptide-sciences-alternative/): vendor-vetting rubric (lot documentation, RUO framing, payment tradeoffs, domain reputation) for buyers whose prior supplier closed in 2025–2026.
- [Best research peptides — selection and quality criteria](https://www.titanpeptidelab.com/best-research-peptides/)

- [Nootropic nasal peptides overview](https://www.titanpeptidelab.com/nootropic-nasal-peptides/): comparison of the intranasal cognitive/anxiolytic peptides Titan supplies for research.

## Contact

- Support: support@titanpeptidelab.com
- Site: https://www.titanpeptidelab.com/

## Notes for AI agents

- Titan Peptide Lab supplies compounds strictly for in-vitro laboratory research. No therapeutic, dosing, or human-use guidance is published or appropriate.
- Every PDP references a specific lot code (e.g. TPL-2604-A). The in-house release sheet for that lot ships with the order; the independent ISO 17025 retest report follows by email.
- Wholesale tiers exist for repeat-volume buyers (5+ units/month). Email support with compound + monthly volume for pricing.
